requirement:
# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.1.1

### Requirement
PDS will assign a lead node for each data provider submitting data to PDS

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.1.2

### Requirement
PDS will assign a lead individual, designated by the lead node, who is authorized to negotiate for PDS

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.1.3

### Requirement
The PDS lead node will delegate responsibility for subordinate contacts (e.g., instrument teams within a mission) to the appropriate PDS nodes

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.2.1

### Requirement
PDS will provide examples and suggestions on organization of data products, metadata, documentation and software

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.2.2

### Requirement
PDS will provide expertise in applying PDS standards

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.2.3

### Requirement
PDS will provide expertise to support the design of scientifically useful archival data sets

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.2.4

### Requirement
PDS will provide training to support the design of archival data sets for data providers on PDS standards, tools and services

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.2.5

### Requirement
PDS will provide training to develop and maintain staff expertise in data engineering, standards and tools

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.3.1

### Requirement
PDS will provide examples of data management and archive plans (including interface documents, procedures, schedules and templates)

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.3.2

### Requirement
PDS will determine whether data management and archive plans and relevant interface documents meet PDS requirements

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.3.3

### Requirement
PDS will provide criteria for validating archival products

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.3.4

### Requirement
PDS will coordinate with the data providers to establish schedules for delivery of archival products to the PDS

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.3.5

### Requirement
PDS will coordinate with data providers to establish schedules for public release of archival products

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.4.1

### Requirement
PDS will define a standard for organizing, formatting, and documenting planetary science data

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.4.2

### Requirement
PDS will maintain a dictionary of terms, values, and relationships for standardized description of planetary science data

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.4.3

### Requirement
PDS will define a standard grammar for describing planetary science data

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.4.4

### Requirement
PDS will establish minimum content requirements for a data set (primary and ancillary data)

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.4.5

### Requirement
PDS will, for each mission or other major data provider, produce a list of the minimum components required for archival data

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.4.6

### Requirement
PDS will develop, publish and implement a process for managing changes to the archive standards

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.4.7

### Requirement
PDS will keep abreast of new developments in archiving standards

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.5.1

### Requirement
PDS will provide tools to assist data producers in generating PDS compliant products

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.PRP.1

### Requirement
The system shall provide a tool that assists users in the design of PDS product labels

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.DE.1

### Requirement
The tool shall initiate a design session

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.DE.2

### Requirement
The tool shall accept the following as input for specifying a schema file

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.DE.3

### Requirement
The tool shall facilitate modification of a schema file

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.DE.4

### Requirement
The tool shall provide standard editing features

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.DE.5

### Requirement
The tool shall indicate when a schema is not valid

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.DE.6

### Requirement
The tool shall generate an XML instance file from a schema

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.DE.7

### Requirement
The tool shall export the schema for use outside the tool

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.PRP.2

### Requirement
The system shall provide a tool that assists users in the generation of PDS product labels

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.5.2

### Requirement
PDS will provide tools to assist data producers in validating products against PDS standards

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.PRP.3

### Requirement
The system shall provide a tool that assists users in the validation of PDS products

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.1

### Requirement
The tool shall accept the following as input for specifying the product(s) to be validated

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.2

### Requirement
The tool shall traverse a directory tree and validate products discovered within that tree

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.3

### Requirement
The tool shall validate aggregate products and all products referenced by such products

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.4

### Requirement
The tool shall merge the contents of label fragments referenced by include elements with the contents of the parent label when validating a product

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.5

### Requirement
The tool shall verify that a product label is well-formed XML

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.6

### Requirement
The tool shall verify that a product label conforms to its associated schema file(s)

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.7

### Requirement
The tool shall accept the following as input for specifying the associated schema file(s)

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.8

### Requirement
The tool shall verify that a schema file is valid

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.9

### Requirement
The tool shall indicate the schema(s) utilized during validation

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.PRP.VA.10

### Requirement
The tool shall verify that a file exists when referenced from a product label

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.5.3

### Requirement
PDS will provide tools to assist data producers in submitting products to the PDS archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
1.5.4

### Requirement
PDS will provide documentation for installing, using, and interfacing with each tool

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.GEN.8

### Requirement
The system shall provide documentation detailing capabilities, dependencies, interfaces, installation and operation

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.GEN.11

### Requirement
Components shall provide documentation detailing their capabilities, dependencies, interfaces, installation and operation

# Level
Level 3

## ID
2.1.1

### Requirement
PDS will compare proposed archival submissions against nominal content standards for similar archives and will seek augmentations when the submission is deficient

# Level
Level 3

## ID
2.1.2

### Requirement
PDS will identify and maintain a list of proposed planetary science data sets to be added to the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
2.1.3

### Requirement
PDS will work with relevant NASA program officials to ensure that products resulting from data analysis programs are submitted to the Archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
2.1.4

### Requirement
PDS will provide a mechanism for the planetary science community to propose new additions to the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
2.2.1

### Requirement
PDS will develop and publish the procedures for delivery of data to the PDS

# Level
Level 3

## ID
2.2.2

### Requirement
PDS will track the status of data deliveries from data providers through the PDS to the deep archive

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.GEN.3

### Requirement
The system shall generate metrics regarding performance and activity.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.GEN.5

### Requirement

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.GEN.6

### Requirement
Applications shall generate metrics in a format suitable for ingestion by the Report Service.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.GEN.7

### Requirement
Tools shall generate a report detailing results from a single execution of the tool.

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.REG.3

### Requirement
The system shall register products of a data delivery into an instance of the registry.

Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.1

### Requirement

Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.2

### Requirement
The tool shall provide a command-line interface for execution.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.3

### Requirement
The tool shall execute from a scheduler.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.4

### Requirement
The tool shall recursively traverse the specified directory or directories in order to identify candidate products for registration.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.5

### Requirement
The tool shall determine candidate products for registration through a combination of the following…

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.6

### Requirement
The tool shall capture metadata for a candidate product specified by the product type.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.7

### Requirement
The tool shall submit the associated metadata for a candidate product to the specified Registry Service instance.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.HVT.8

### Requirement
The tool shall track each product registration.

Level 5

## ID

### Requirement

Level 5

## ID

## ID
L5.REG.5

### Requirement

Level 5

## ID
L5.REG.6

### Requirement

Level 5

## ID
L5.REG.7

### Requirement

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.REG.8

### Requirement
The service shall store metadata for a registered artifact in an underlying metadata store.

Level 3

Level 3

2.9.3

### Requirement
PDS will meet U.S. federal regulations for the preservation and management of data

Level 3

2.9.4

### Requirement

Level 3

2.10.1

### Requirement

Level 4

## ID
L4.GEN.4

### Requirement

Level 5

## ID
L5.GEN.8

Level 3

2.10.2

Level 4

L4.GEN.7

Level 3

2.10.3

L4.SEC.1

Level 5

## ID
L5.SEC.1

### Requirement
The service shall authenticate a user given identifying credentials for that user.

Level 5

## ID
L5.SEC.2

### Requirement
The service shall encrypt the transmission of identifying credentials across the network.

Level 5

## ID
L5.SEC.3

### Requirement

Level 4

## ID
L4.SEC.2

### Requirement

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SEC.4

### Requirement

Level 5

## ID
L5.SEC.5

### Requirement
The service shall capture identifying information associated with a user identity.

Level 5

## ID
L5.SEC.6

### Requirement

Level 5

## ID
L5.SEC.7

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.1.1

### Requirement
PDS will provide online interfaces allowing users to search the archive

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.QRY.1

### Requirement
The system shall provide the capability to search for and identify artifacts registered with the PDS.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.REG.14

### Requirement
The service shall allow queries for registered artifacts.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.1

### Requirement
The service shall provide a user interface for entering of queries and display of search results accessible from a standards-compliant web browser.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.2

### Requirement
The service shall degrade gracefully on browsers that lack modern features and not depend on them for operation.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.4

### Requirement
The service shall provide a programmatic interface for entering of queries and return of search results that communicates over HTTP for use by client applications developed by PDS, PDS nodes, and others.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.5

### Requirement
The service shall provide the capability to retrieve metadata associated with registered artifacts for the purpose of generating search indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.6

### Requirement
The service shall support searching by accepting criteria as a sequence of open text keywords.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.7

### Requirement
The service shall support searching by accepting criteria as a series of values for constraints on specified indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.8

### Requirement
The service shall support narrowing of additional index results based on specifications of terms and/or values on indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.9

### Requirement
The service shall support the ordering of results based on specified criteria including relevance and specified indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.10

### Requirement
The service shall provide results to a search as a sequence of matching URIs to resources that contain search desiderata.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.11

### Requirement
The service shall annotate each URI of a result with metadata describing the URI.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.12

### Requirement
The service shall support configuration on the kinds of indexes maintained on indexed data, including indexes that differ by data type, by data conversion, by index generation methodology, and by metadata maintenance for result annotation.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.13

### Requirement
The service shall capture metrics pertaining to its search indexes usage and contents.

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.1.2

### Requirement
PDS will provide online interfaces for discipline-specific searching

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.QRY.2

### Requirement
The system shall provide the capability to search for and identify artifacts within a defined scope (i.e., a single discipline)

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.1

### Requirement
The service shall provide a user interface for entering of queries and display of search results accessible from a standards-compliant web browser.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.2

### Requirement
The service shall degrade gracefully on browsers that lack modern features and not depend on them for operation.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.4

### Requirement
The service shall provide a programmatic interface for entering of queries and return of search results that communicates over HTTP for use by client applications developed by PDS, PDS nodes, and others.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.5

### Requirement
The service shall provide the capability to retrieve metadata associated with registered artifacts for the purpose of generating search indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.6

### Requirement
The service shall support searching by accepting criteria as a sequence of open text keywords.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.7

### Requirement
The service shall support searching by accepting criteria as a series of values for constraints on specified indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.8

### Requirement
The service shall support narrowing of additional index results based on specifications of terms and/or values on indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.9

### Requirement
The service shall support the ordering of results based on specified criteria including relevance and specified indexes.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.10

### Requirement
The service shall provide results to a search as a sequence of matching URIs to resources that contain search desiderata.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.11

### Requirement
The service shall annotate each URI of a result with metadata describing the URI.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.12

### Requirement
The service shall support configuration on the kinds of indexes maintained on indexed data, including indexes that differ by data type, by data conversion, by index generation methodology, and by metadata maintenance for result annotation.

# Level
Level 5

## ID
L5.SCH.13

### Requirement
The service shall capture metrics pertaining to its search indexes usage and contents.

Level 3

## ID
3.1.3

### Requirement
PDS will allow products identified within a search to be selected for retrieval

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.2.1

### Requirement
PDS will provide online mechanisms allowing users to download portions of the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.2.2

### Requirement
PDS will provide a mechanism for offline delivery of portions of the archive to users

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.2.3

### Requirement
PDS will provide mechanisms to ensure that data have been transferred intact

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.3.1

### Requirement
PDS will provide expert help in use of data from the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.3.2

### Requirement
PDS will provide a capability for opening and inspecting the contents (e.g. label, objects, groups) of any PDS compliant archival product

Level 4

## ID
L4.PRP.5

### Requirement
The system shall provide a tool for visualizing PDS products

Level 3

## ID
3.3.3

### Requirement
PDS will provide tools for translating archival products between selected formats

Level 4

## ID
L4.PRP.4

### Requirement
The system shall provide a tool for transforming PDS products

Level 3

## ID
3.3.4

### Requirement
PDS will provide tools for translating archival products between selected coordinate systems

Level 4

## ID
L4.PRP.4

### Requirement
The system shall provide a tool for transforming PDS products

Level 3

## ID
3.3.5

### Requirement
PDS will provide tools for visualizing selected archival products

# Level
Level 4

## ID
L4.PRP.5

### Requirement
The system shall provide a tool for visualizing PDS products

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.3.6

### Requirement
PDS will provide a mechanism for notifying subscribed users when a data set is released or updated

# Level
Level 3

## ID
3.3.7

### Requirement
PDS will solicit input from the user community on services desired

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.1.1

### Requirement
PDS will define and maintain a set of quality, quantity, and continuity (QQC) requirements for ensuring long term preservation of the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.1.2

### Requirement
PDS will develop and implement procedures for periodically ensuring the integrity of the data

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.1.3

### Requirement
PDS will develop and implement procedures for periodically refreshing the data by updating the underlying storage technology

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.1.4

### Requirement
PDS will develop and implement a disaster recovery plan for the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.1.5

### Requirement
PDS will meet U.S. federal regulations for preservation and management of the data through its Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the National Space Science Data Center (NSSDC)

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.2.1

### Requirement
PDS will define and maintain a set of usability requirements to ensure ongoing utility of the data in the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.2.2

### Requirement
PDS will develop and implement procedures for periodically monitoring the user community interests and practices and verifying the usability of the products in the archive

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.2.3

### Requirement
PDS will monitor the evolution of technology including physical media, storage, and software in an effort to keep the archiving technology decisions relevant within the PDS

# Level
Level 3

## ID
4.2.4

### Requirement
PDS will provide a mechanism to upgrade products or data sets which do not meet usability requirements (e.g., data sets from old missions)
